camera.title: Identify Plant
camera.permissionDenied: Camera permission was denied. Please enable it in your device settings to identify plants.
camera.permissionPrompt: Allow camera access so you can photograph plants for identification.
camera.centerPlant: Center the plant in the frame

results.title: Identification Results
results.saveFlowBody: Decide whether this belongs to your care routine or to your field journal, then place it in the right space.
results.saveManagedHint: Choose this for plants you care for at home, in the garden or on the balcony.
results.saveSightingHint: Choose this for flowers, trees and plants you discover outside and want to remember.
results.spaceHintManaged: This helps organize reminders, collection views and routines later.
results.spaceHintSighting: Use the place that best matches where you found or keep track of it.
results.saveManagedSummary: This will be saved as a managed plant in {{space}}.
results.saveSightingSummary: This will be saved as a sighting in {{space}}.
results.lowConfidenceWarning: Low confidence result. Try a clearer photo for better accuracy.
results.careComingSoon: Care info coming soon for this species.

collection.title: My Plants
collection.empty: You haven't saved any plants yet.

home.emptyTitle: Your care space starts with one plant.
home.emptyBody: Identify your first plant to unlock a routine with reminders, notes, and care insights that feel much less generic.
home.emptyGuideTitle: What changes after the first scan
home.emptyGuideBody: The app becomes much richer once it has a plant to organize around, so the first action should feel like the beginning of a routine.
home.emptyGuideScan: Scan and save your first plant
home.emptyGuideTrack: Build a collection with photos and notes
home.focusBodyWatering: Start with {{plants}} and work through the rest of your collection.
home.focusBodyCalm: No urgent care tasks right now across your {{count}} saved plants.
home.todayNeedsCareBody: Start from what deserves attention, then move on with the rest of the day.
home.todayUpcomingBody: The next reminder or quiet moment in your care routine.
home.todayCollectionBody: A quick preview of your latest plants without dropping into the full collection.
home.collectionSearchBody: Search, filter and switch views here. This is the place for the full library.
home.collectionSightingsBody: A quieter view for flowers, trees and plants you've noticed outside your care routine.
home.allCalmBody: Nothing urgent right now. You can review your collection or add a new plant when you want.
home.careBoardCaption: A quick read of what deserves your attention before you dive into the full collection.
home.needsAttentionBody: {{plants}} are the first plants to check today.
home.needsAttentionEmpty: No plants are overdue for watering right now.
home.nextReminderEmpty: No pending reminders. Add one from a plant detail page.
home.collectionPulseBody: You currently manage {{collection}} plants and {{reminders}} active reminders across your routine.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.streakZeroMsg: Start watering to build your streak!

detail.title: Plant Details
detail.infoEditorBody: Keep the identity of this plant tidy so the rest of the care flow feels specific and personal.
detail.notesBody: Capture what changes over time, what works, and the little context you will want later.
detail.notesMetadataBody: Use these fields to turn a plain note into a richer record of where this plant came from.

observation.summaryBody: A quieter view for what you observed, where you found it, and the context worth keeping.
observation.contextBody: Use this area to remember where the plant was found and what made the sighting interesting.
observation.referenceBody: If care knowledge exists for this species, you can still keep it here as reference without turning the sighting into a managed plant.
observation.referenceEmpty: No structured reference profile is available for this species yet.
observation.journalBody: Treat this tab like a field journal: what you saw, the conditions around it, and why you may want to revisit it.
observation.metadataBody: Capture the scene around the sighting so this record feels like a memory, not just an ID result.
observation.conditionsPlaceholder: Cloudy morning, damp soil, full sun...
observation.observedWithPlaceholder: Alone, with Anna, during a walk...

care.summaryBody: A quick reading of this plant's care rhythm, environment, and the main things worth watching over time.

history.comingSoonDetail: Watering history and growth tracking will appear here.
history.recentActivityBody: Waterings and reminders now live in one timeline so the care rhythm is easier to read at a glance.
history.emptyDetail: Add your first reminder or log a watering to start building a history for this plant.
history.actionsPrompt: What would you like to do?
history.deleteReminderBody: Are you sure you want to remove this reminder?

reminder.invalidDateBody: Reminders must be scheduled for today or future dates.
reminder.labelRequiredBody: Please enter a label for custom reminders.
reminder.saveErrorBody: Failed to save reminder. Please try again.

detail.deleteBody: This will permanently remove the plant from your collection.
detail.convertTitle: Add this sighting to your care routine?
detail.convertBody: This will turn the sighting into a managed plant and place it in {{space}}.
detail.convertBodyChoice: Choose where this should live once it becomes part of your care routine.
detail.convertInlineBody: Turn this sighting into a managed plant and choose where it belongs in your routine.

gallery.title: Photos
gallery.emptyHint: Tap + to add your first photo
gallery.deleteWarning: This photo will be permanently removed.
gallery.deleteOnlyWarning: This is the only photo. Deleting it will remove the primary image.
gallery.addPhotoError: Failed to add photo. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.communityFeatures: Sign in to access community features
settings.notificationsRequiredBody: Please enable notifications in system settings to receive watering reminders.
settings.enableInSystemSettings: Enable in system settings to receive watering reminders.
settings.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

rateLimit.title: Daily Limit Reached
rateLimit.message: You've used all {{limit}} identifications for today. Come back tomorrow!

pro.collectionFull: Free users can save up to 10 plants. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited collection.
pro.scanLimitPro: Pro users get 15 scans per day. You've used {{used}} of {{limit}}.
pro.proThankYou: Thank you for being a Pro user!
pro.restoreSuccess: Your Pro purchase has been restored!
pro.restoreError: Could not restore purchases. Check your connection.
pro.termsNote: Payment charged to App Store account. Managed by Apple.

screen1.title: Welcome to Plantid
screen1.description: Identify any plant instantly with your camera — completely free, no subscription needed.

screen2.title: Snap & Identify
screen2.description: Take a photo of any leaf, flower, fruit, or bark. Our AI identifies the species in seconds.

screen3.title: Build Your Collection
screen3.description: Save your plants, track watering schedules, and access care tips tailored to each species.

errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.cameraPermission: Camera permission is required to take photos.
errors.apiError: Unable to identify plant. Please try again.

community.beFirst: Be the first to like this
community.emptyFeedCTA: Be the first to share a plant!

errors.displayNameTooLong: Display name must be 50 characters or less
errors.bioTooLong: Bio must be 500 characters or less

lightMeter.title: Light Meter
lightMeter.subtitle: Measure ambient light for optimal plant placement

recommendations.title: Good for:
recommendations.brightIndirect: Fiddle Leaf Fig, Bird of Paradise

instructions.title: How to measure
instructions.point: Point your device toward the light source
instructions.multiple: Take multiple readings throughout the day

lightMeter.disclaimer: This is a guide only. For precise measurements, use professional equipment.

calibration.title: Calibrate
calibration.instruction: Place a white paper in view and select a known light level
